name: workspace-module-duplex-interaction-system
title: Workspace Module 通用双工交互系统
description: 冻结 Canvas/Interaction V1：通过父任务 work-items 落实 async Rhai OperationScript、versioned InteractionInstance、Extension component ABI、SourceBundle/distribution/resource binding，以及 RuntimeGateway/Workspace projection 的完整收敛。
creator: cursor-agent
notes: V1 冻结方案已收敛：OperationScript 是 async executor 承载的 ephemeral rhai_v1 脚本，使用 execution-scoped ops capability 与 structured concurrency；InteractionInstance 继承 definition owner scope，使用 versioned state_patch_v1、direct/human-only 与 replay-safe OperationEffectIntent；Canvas 由 immutable SourceBundle/lineage/resource binding 的 InteractionDefinition 整体替换，完整承接 publish/copy/unpublish/VFS/promotion；Extension 贡献 Component + Operation 并 exact artifact pin。所有稳定合同从 V1 显式版本化，future breaking change 使用 V2 + 显式 migration。
